text.title: AWS Infrastructure Design — LLM Prompt Templates Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the AWS Infrastructure Design — LLM Prompt Templates methodology end-to-end. Each step declares input, action, output, and decision-gate.

step.name: select-template
step.action: Pick design / review / IAM / DR / migration prompt template.
step.decision-gate: Intents not matching any template: extend templates, do not freestyle.

step.name: populate-context
step.action: Fill workload context, constraints, required output schema.

step.name: lint-output
step.action: Validate response against the required JSON schema.
step.decision-gate: Schema violations: route to repair prompt or escalate.
